1.text: Now king<S>4428</S> David<S>1732</S> was old<S>2204</S> and stricken<S>935</S> in years<S>3117</S>; and they covered<S>3680</S> him with clothes<S>899</S>, but he gat no heat<S>3179</S>. <sup>stricken: Heb. entered into days</sup>

Wherefore his servants<S>5650</S> said<S>559</S> unto him, Let there be sought<S>1245</S> for my lord<S>113</S> the king<S>4428</S> a young<S>5291</S> virgin<S>1330</S>: and let her stand<S>5975</S> before<S>6440</S> the king<S>4428</S>, and let her cherish<S>5532</S> him, and let her lie<S>7901</S> in thy bosom<S>2436</S>, that my lord<S>113</S> the king<S>4428</S> may get heat<S>2552</S>. <sup>Let there: Heb. Let them seek</sup> <sup>a young: Heb. a damsel, a virgin</sup> <sup>cherish: Heb. be a cherisher unto him</sup>

So they sought<S>1245</S> for a fair<S>3303</S> damsel<S>5291</S> throughout all the coasts<S>1366</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>, and found<S>4672</S> Abishag<S>49</S> a Shunammite<S>7767</S>, and brought<S>935</S> her to the king<S>4428</S>.
And the damsel<S>5291</S> was very<S>3966</S> fair<S>3303</S>, and cherished<S>5532</S> the king<S>4428</S>, and ministered<S>8334</S> to him: but the king<S>4428</S> knew<S>3045</S> her not.

Then Adonijah<S>138</S> the son<S>1121</S> of Haggith<S>2294</S> exalted<S>4984</S> himself, saying<S>559</S>, I will be king<S>4427</S>: and he prepared<S>6213</S> him chariots<S>7393</S> and horsemen<S>6571</S>, and fifty<S>2572</S> men<S>376</S> to run<S>7323</S> before<S>6440</S> him. <sup>be king: Heb. reign</sup>

And his father<S>1</S> had not displeased<S>6087</S> him at any time<S>3117</S> in saying<S>559</S>, Why hast thou done so<S>6213</S>? and he also was a very<S>3966</S> goodly<S>2896</S> <S>8389</S> man; and his mother bare<S>3205</S> him after<S>310</S> Absalom<S>53</S>. <sup>at any: Heb. from his days</sup>

And he conferred<S>1697</S> with Joab<S>3097</S> the son<S>1121</S> of Zeruiah<S>6870</S>, and with Abiathar<S>54</S> the priest<S>3548</S>: and they following<S>310</S> Adonijah<S>138</S> helped<S>5826</S> him. <sup>he: Heb. his words were with</sup> <sup>following: Heb. helped after Adonijah</sup>

But Zadok<S>6659</S> the priest<S>3548</S>, and Benaiah<S>1141</S> the son<S>1121</S> of Jehoiada<S>3077</S>, and Nathan<S>5416</S> the prophet<S>5030</S>, and Shimei<S>8096</S>, and Rei<S>7472</S>, and the mighty men<S>1368</S> which belonged to David<S>1732</S>, were not with Adonijah<S>138</S>.

And Adonijah<S>138</S> slew<S>2076</S> sheep<S>6629</S> and oxen<S>1241</S> and fat cattle<S>4806</S> by the stone<S>68</S> of Zoheleth<S>2120</S>, which is by<S>681</S> Enrogel<S>5883</S>, and called<S>7121</S> all his brethren<S>251</S> the king's<S>4428</S> sons<S>1121</S>, and all the men<S>582</S> of Judah<S>3063</S> the king's<S>4428</S> servants<S>5650</S>: <sup>Enrogel: or, the well Rogel</sup>
But Nathan<S>5416</S> the prophet<S>5030</S>, and Benaiah<S>1141</S>, and the mighty men<S>1368</S>, and Solomon<S>8010</S> his brother<S>251</S>, he called<S>7121</S> not.

Wherefore Nathan<S>5416</S> spake<S>559</S> unto Bathsheba<S>1339</S> the mother<S>517</S> of Solomon<S>8010</S>, saying<S>559</S>, Hast thou not heard<S>8085</S> that Adonijah<S>138</S> the son<S>1121</S> of Haggith<S>2294</S> doth reign<S>4427</S>, and David<S>1732</S> our lord<S>113</S> knoweth<S>3045</S> it not?

Now therefore come<S>3212</S>, let me, I pray thee, give thee counsel<S>3289</S> <S>6098</S>, that thou mayest save<S>4422</S> thine own life<S>5315</S>, and the life<S>5315</S> of thy son<S>1121</S> Solomon<S>8010</S>.

Go<S>3212</S> and get thee in<S>935</S> unto king<S>4428</S> David<S>1732</S>, and say<S>559</S> unto him, Didst not thou, my lord<S>113</S>, O king<S>4428</S>, swear<S>7650</S> unto thine handmaid<S>519</S>, saying<S>559</S>, Assuredly<S>3588</S> Solomon<S>8010</S> thy son<S>1121</S> shall reign<S>4427</S> after<S>310</S> me, and he shall sit<S>3427</S> upon my throne<S>3678</S>? why then doth Adonijah<S>138</S> reign<S>4427</S>?

Behold, while thou yet talkest<S>1696</S> there with the king<S>4428</S>, I also will come in<S>935</S> after<S>310</S> thee, and confirm<S>4390</S> thy words<S>1697</S>. <sup>confirm: Heb. fill up</sup>

And Bathsheba<S>1339</S> went in<S>935</S> unto the king<S>4428</S> into the chamber<S>2315</S>: and the king<S>4428</S> was very<S>3966</S> old<S>2204</S>; and Abishag<S>49</S> the Shunammite<S>7767</S> ministered<S>8334</S> unto the king<S>4428</S>.
And Bathsheba<S>1339</S> bowed<S>6915</S>, and did obeisance<S>7812</S> unto the king<S>4428</S>. And the king<S>4428</S> said<S>559</S>, What wouldest thou? <sup>What: Heb. What to thee?</sup>

And she said<S>559</S> unto him, My lord<S>113</S>, thou swarest<S>7650</S> by the LORD<S>3068</S> thy God<S>430</S> unto thine handmaid<S>519</S>, saying, Assuredly Solomon<S>8010</S> thy son<S>1121</S> shall reign<S>4427</S> after<S>310</S> me, and he shall sit<S>3427</S> upon my throne<S>3678</S>.
And now, behold, Adonijah<S>138</S> reigneth<S>4427</S>; and now, my lord<S>113</S> the king<S>4428</S>, thou knowest<S>3045</S> it not:

And he hath slain<S>2076</S> oxen<S>7794</S> and fat cattle<S>4806</S> and sheep<S>6629</S> in abundance<S>7230</S>, and hath called<S>7121</S> all the sons<S>1121</S> of the king<S>4428</S>, and Abiathar<S>54</S> the priest<S>3548</S>, and Joab<S>3097</S> the captain<S>8269</S> of the host<S>6635</S>: but Solomon<S>8010</S> thy servant<S>5650</S> hath he not called<S>7121</S>.

And thou, my lord<S>113</S>, O king<S>4428</S>, the eyes<S>5869</S> of all Israel<S>3478</S> are upon thee, that thou shouldest tell<S>5046</S> them who shall sit<S>3427</S> on the throne<S>3678</S> of my lord<S>113</S> the king<S>4428</S> after<S>310</S> him.

Otherwise it shall come to pass, when my lord<S>113</S> the king<S>4428</S> shall sleep<S>7901</S> with his fathers<S>1</S>, that I and my son<S>1121</S> Solomon<S>8010</S> shall be counted offenders<S>2400</S>. <sup>offenders: Heb. sinners</sup>
And, lo, while she yet talked<S>1696</S> with the king<S>4428</S>, Nathan<S>5416</S> the prophet<S>5030</S> also came in<S>935</S>.

And they told<S>5046</S> the king<S>4428</S>, saying<S>559</S>, Behold Nathan<S>5416</S> the prophet<S>5030</S>. And when he was come in<S>935</S> before<S>6440</S> the king<S>4428</S>, he bowed<S>7812</S> himself before the king<S>4428</S> with his face<S>639</S> to the ground<S>776</S>.

And Nathan<S>5416</S> said<S>559</S>, My lord<S>113</S>, O king<S>4428</S>, hast thou said<S>559</S>, Adonijah<S>138</S> shall reign<S>4427</S> after<S>310</S> me, and he shall sit<S>3427</S> upon my throne<S>3678</S>?

For he is gone down<S>3381</S> this day<S>3117</S>, and hath slain<S>2076</S> oxen<S>7794</S> and fat cattle<S>4806</S> and sheep<S>6629</S> in abundance<S>7230</S>, and hath called<S>7121</S> all the king's<S>4428</S> sons<S>1121</S>, and the captains<S>8269</S> of the host<S>6635</S>, and Abiathar<S>54</S> the priest<S>3548</S>; and, behold, they eat<S>398</S> and drink<S>8354</S> before<S>6440</S> him, and say<S>559</S>, God save<S>2421</S> king<S>4428</S> Adonijah<S>138</S>. <sup>God: Heb. Let king Adonijah live</sup>

But me, even me thy servant<S>5650</S>, and Zadok<S>6659</S> the priest<S>3548</S>, and Benaiah<S>1141</S> the son<S>1121</S> of Jehoiada<S>3077</S>, and thy servant<S>5650</S> Solomon<S>8010</S>, hath he not called<S>7121</S>.

Is this thing<S>1697</S> done<S>1961</S> by my lord<S>113</S> the king<S>4428</S>, and thou hast not shewed<S>3045</S> it unto thy servant<S>5650</S>, who should sit<S>3427</S> on the throne<S>3678</S> of my lord<S>113</S> the king<S>4428</S> after<S>310</S> him?

Then king<S>4428</S> David<S>1732</S> answered<S>6030</S> and said<S>559</S>, Call<S>7121</S> me Bathsheba<S>1339</S>. And she came<S>935</S> into the king's<S>4428</S> presence<S>6440</S>, and stood<S>5975</S> before<S>6440</S> the king<S>4428</S>. <sup>into: Heb. before the king</sup>
And the king<S>4428</S> sware<S>7650</S>, and said<S>559</S>, As the LORD<S>3068</S> liveth<S>2416</S>, that hath redeemed<S>6299</S> my soul<S>5315</S> out of all distress<S>6869</S>,

Even as I sware<S>7650</S> unto thee by the LORD<S>3068</S> God<S>430</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>, saying<S>559</S>, Assuredly Solomon<S>8010</S> thy son<S>1121</S> shall reign<S>4427</S> after<S>310</S> me, and he shall sit<S>3427</S> upon my throne<S>3678</S> in my stead; even so will I certainly do<S>6213</S> this day<S>3117</S>.

Then Bathsheba<S>1339</S> bowed<S>6915</S> with her face<S>639</S> to the earth<S>776</S>, and did reverence<S>7812</S> to the king<S>4428</S>, and said<S>559</S>, Let my lord<S>113</S> king<S>4428</S> David<S>1732</S> live<S>2421</S> for ever<S>5769</S>.

And king<S>4428</S> David<S>1732</S> said<S>559</S>, Call<S>7121</S> me Zadok<S>6659</S> the priest<S>3548</S>, and Nathan<S>5416</S> the prophet<S>5030</S>, and Benaiah<S>1141</S> the son<S>1121</S> of Jehoiada<S>3077</S>. And they came<S>935</S> before<S>6440</S> the king<S>4428</S>.

The king<S>4428</S> also said<S>559</S> unto them, Take<S>3947</S> with you the servants<S>5650</S> of your lord<S>113</S>, and cause Solomon<S>8010</S> my son<S>1121</S> to ride<S>7392</S> upon mine own mule<S>6506</S>, and bring him down<S>3381</S> to Gihon<S>1521</S>: <sup>mine: Heb. which belongeth to me</sup>

And let Zadok<S>6659</S> the priest<S>3548</S> and Nathan<S>5416</S> the prophet<S>5030</S> anoint<S>4886</S> him there king<S>4428</S> over Israel<S>3478</S>: and blow<S>8628</S> ye with the trumpet<S>7782</S>, and say<S>559</S>, God save<S>2421</S> king<S>4428</S> Solomon<S>8010</S>.

Then ye shall come up<S>5927</S> after<S>310</S> him, that he may come<S>935</S> and sit<S>3427</S> upon my throne<S>3678</S>; for he shall be king<S>4427</S> in my stead: and I have appointed<S>6680</S> him to be ruler<S>5057</S> over Israel<S>3478</S> and over Judah<S>3063</S>.

And Benaiah<S>1141</S> the son<S>1121</S> of Jehoiada<S>3077</S> answered<S>6030</S> the king<S>4428</S>, and said<S>559</S>, Amen<S>543</S>: the LORD<S>3068</S> God<S>430</S> of my lord<S>113</S> the king<S>4428</S> say<S>559</S> so too.

As the LORD<S>3068</S> hath been with my lord<S>113</S> the king<S>4428</S>, even so be he with Solomon<S>8010</S>, and make<S>1431</S> his throne<S>3678</S> greater<S>1431</S> than the throne<S>3678</S> of my lord<S>113</S> king<S>4428</S> David<S>1732</S>.

So Zadok<S>6659</S> the priest<S>3548</S>, and Nathan<S>5416</S> the prophet<S>5030</S>, and Benaiah<S>1141</S> the son<S>1121</S> of Jehoiada<S>3077</S>, and the Cherethites<S>3774</S>, and the Pelethites<S>6432</S>, went down<S>3381</S>, and caused Solomon<S>8010</S> to ride<S>7392</S> upon king<S>4428</S> David's<S>1732</S> mule<S>6506</S>, and brought<S>3212</S> him to Gihon<S>1521</S>.

And Zadok<S>6659</S> the priest<S>3548</S> took<S>3947</S> an horn<S>7161</S> of oil<S>8081</S> out of the tabernacle<S>168</S>, and anointed<S>4886</S> Solomon<S>8010</S>. And they blew<S>8628</S> the trumpet<S>7782</S>; and all the people<S>5971</S> said<S>559</S>, God save<S>2421</S> king<S>4428</S> Solomon<S>8010</S>.

And all the people<S>5971</S> came up<S>5927</S> after<S>310</S> him, and the people<S>5971</S> piped<S>2490</S> with pipes<S>2485</S>, and rejoiced<S>8056</S> with great<S>1419</S> joy<S>8057</S>, so that the earth<S>776</S> rent<S>1234</S> with the sound<S>6963</S> of them. <sup>pipes: or, flutes</sup>

And Adonijah<S>138</S> and all the guests<S>7121</S> that were with him heard<S>8085</S> it as they had made an end<S>3615</S> of eating<S>398</S>. And when Joab<S>3097</S> heard<S>8085</S> the sound<S>6963</S> of the trumpet<S>7782</S>, he said<S>559</S>, Wherefore is this noise<S>6963</S> of the city<S>7151</S> being in an uproar<S>1993</S>?

And while he yet spake<S>1696</S>, behold, Jonathan<S>3129</S> the son<S>1121</S> of Abiathar<S>54</S> the priest<S>3548</S> came<S>935</S>: and Adonijah<S>138</S> said<S>559</S> unto him, Come in<S>935</S>; for thou art a valiant<S>2428</S> man<S>376</S> <S>381</S>, and bringest<S>1319</S> good<S>2896</S> tidings<S>1319</S>.
And Jonathan<S>3129</S> answered<S>6030</S> and said<S>559</S> to Adonijah<S>138</S>, Verily<S>61</S> our lord<S>113</S> king<S>4428</S> David<S>1732</S> hath made Solomon<S>8010</S> king<S>4427</S>.

And the king<S>4428</S> hath sent<S>7971</S> with him Zadok<S>6659</S> the priest<S>3548</S>, and Nathan<S>5416</S> the prophet<S>5030</S>, and Benaiah<S>1141</S> the son<S>1121</S> of Jehoiada<S>3077</S>, and the Cherethites<S>3774</S>, and the Pelethites<S>6432</S>, and they have caused him to ride<S>7392</S> upon the king's<S>4428</S> mule<S>6506</S>:

And Zadok<S>6659</S> the priest<S>3548</S> and Nathan<S>5416</S> the prophet<S>5030</S> have anointed<S>4886</S> him king<S>4428</S> in Gihon<S>1521</S>: and they are come up<S>5927</S> from thence rejoicing<S>8056</S>, so that the city<S>7151</S> rang again<S>1949</S>. This is the noise<S>6963</S> that ye have heard<S>8085</S>.
And also Solomon<S>8010</S> sitteth<S>3427</S> on the throne<S>3678</S> of the kingdom<S>4410</S>.

And moreover the king's<S>4428</S> servants<S>5650</S> came<S>935</S> to bless<S>1288</S> our lord<S>113</S> king<S>4428</S> David<S>1732</S>, saying<S>559</S>, God<S>430</S> make the name<S>8034</S> of Solomon<S>8010</S> better<S>3190</S> than thy name<S>8034</S>, and make<S>1431</S> his throne<S>3678</S> greater<S>1431</S> than thy throne<S>3678</S>. And the king<S>4428</S> bowed<S>7812</S> himself upon the bed<S>4904</S>.

And also thus said<S>559</S> the king<S>4428</S>, Blessed<S>1288</S> be the LORD<S>3068</S> God<S>430</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>, which hath given<S>5414</S> one to sit<S>3427</S> on my throne<S>3678</S> this day<S>3117</S>, mine eyes<S>5869</S> even seeing<S>7200</S> it.
And all the guests<S>7121</S> that were with Adonijah<S>138</S> were afraid<S>2729</S>, and rose up<S>6965</S>, and went<S>3212</S> every man<S>376</S> his way<S>1870</S>.

And Adonijah<S>138</S> feared<S>3372</S> because<S>6440</S> of Solomon<S>8010</S>, and arose<S>6965</S>, and went<S>3212</S>, and caught hold<S>2388</S> on the horns<S>7161</S> of the altar<S>4196</S>.

And it was told<S>5046</S> Solomon<S>8010</S>, saying<S>559</S>, Behold, Adonijah<S>138</S> feareth<S>3372</S> king<S>4428</S> Solomon<S>8010</S>: for, lo, he hath caught hold<S>270</S> on the horns<S>7161</S> of the altar<S>4196</S>, saying<S>559</S>, Let king<S>4428</S> Solomon<S>8010</S> swear<S>7650</S> unto me to day<S>3117</S> that he will not slay<S>4191</S> his servant<S>5650</S> with the sword<S>2719</S>.

And Solomon<S>8010</S> said<S>559</S>, If he will shew himself a worthy<S>2428</S> man<S>1121</S>, there shall not an hair<S>8185</S> of him fall<S>5307</S> to the earth<S>776</S>: but if wickedness<S>7451</S> shall be found<S>4672</S> in him, he shall die<S>4191</S>.

So king<S>4428</S> Solomon<S>8010</S> sent<S>7971</S>, and they brought him down<S>3381</S> from the altar<S>4196</S>. And he came<S>935</S> and bowed<S>7812</S> himself to king<S>4428</S> Solomon<S>8010</S>: and Solomon<S>8010</S> said<S>559</S> unto him, Go<S>3212</S> to thine house<S>1004</S>.

2.text: Now the days<S>3117</S> of David<S>1732</S> drew nigh<S>7126</S> that he should die<S>4191</S>; and he charged<S>6680</S> Solomon<S>8010</S> his son<S>1121</S>, saying<S>559</S>,
I go<S>1980</S> the way<S>1870</S> of all the earth<S>776</S>: be thou strong<S>2388</S> therefore, and shew thyself a man<S>376</S>;

And keep<S>8104</S> the charge<S>4931</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S> thy God<S>430</S>, to walk<S>3212</S> in his ways<S>1870</S>, to keep<S>8104</S> his statutes<S>2708</S>, and his commandments<S>4687</S>, and his judgments<S>4941</S>, and his testimonies<S>5715</S>, as it is written<S>3789</S> in the law<S>8451</S> of Moses<S>4872</S>, that thou mayest prosper<S>7919</S> in all that thou doest<S>6213</S>, and whithersoever thou turnest<S>6437</S> thyself: <sup>prosper: or, do wisely</sup>

That the LORD<S>3068</S> may continue<S>6965</S> his word<S>1697</S> which he spake<S>1696</S> concerning me, saying<S>559</S>, If thy children<S>1121</S> take heed<S>8104</S> to their way<S>1870</S>, to walk<S>3212</S> before<S>6440</S> me in truth<S>571</S> with all their heart<S>3824</S> and with all their soul<S>5315</S>, there shall not fail<S>3772</S> thee (said<S>559</S> he) a man<S>376</S> on the throne<S>3678</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>. <sup>fail: Heb. be cut off from thee from the throne</sup>

Moreover thou knowest<S>3045</S> also what Joab<S>3097</S> the son<S>1121</S> of Zeruiah<S>6870</S> did<S>6213</S> to me, and what he did<S>6213</S> to the two<S>8147</S> captains<S>8269</S> of the hosts<S>6635</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>, unto Abner<S>74</S> the son<S>1121</S> of Ner<S>5369</S>, and unto Amasa<S>6021</S> the son<S>1121</S> of Jether<S>3500</S>, whom he slew<S>2026</S>, and shed<S>7760</S> the blood<S>1818</S> of war<S>4421</S> in peace<S>7965</S>, and put<S>5414</S> the blood<S>1818</S> of war<S>4421</S> upon his girdle<S>2290</S> that was about his loins<S>4975</S>, and in his shoes<S>5275</S> that were on his feet<S>7272</S>. <sup>shed: Heb. put</sup>
